# hammer

> ai producer. ten-plus years on broadcast and agency pipelines, now producing with ai. la · ny · remote. brand systems, agents, motion graphics, animation, pipelines, interactive demos, visual media, websites.

## work

- [atrium](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work): 8 portfolio categories. each a collection of pieces.
- [brand systems](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work/brand-systems): identities built with ai in the loop. hammer · kira · effigy dossiers are live.
- [agents](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work/agents): autonomous characters layered over agents. kira detail is live at /work/agents/kira.
- [motion graphics](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work/motion-graphics): programmatic motion built in remotion + hyperframes. v3 reel is live.
- [animation](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work/animation): puppet character animation built with rive + remotion.
- [pipelines + tools](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work/pipelines-tools): the tools beneath the work. pipeline visualizer detail page includes cost + time.
- [interactive + playable](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work/interactive-playable): planned demos. talk-to-character, prompt-to-storyboard, consistency lab.
- [visual media](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work/visual-media): ai-native film, short-form video, commercial work.
- [websites](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/work/websites): ai-native websites. hammathyme, onlykira.ai, opencrawl.gg, and coefficient.mythx.art have Hammer preview pages, then link to the live sites.

## about

- [bio](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/about): jeff hammer. tribune media → discovery → comcast → ai producer. clients include cadillac, porsche, lululemon, fox, columbia, hulu, ihg hotels, rémy martin.

## contact

- [say hi](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/contact): hello@hammathyme.ai. taking projects, 48-hour reply.

## colophon

- [colophon](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/colophon): typefaces, build stack, models used, deploy info. nothing hidden.

## memory

- [jeff.md](https://hammathyme.vercel.app/memories/jeff.md): MEMORY.md in hermes-agent format (☤). frozen-snapshot summary of the operator behind the site.
